task_completion.description: Verify that the three new child Area Paths ('Backend', 'Frontend', and 'Infrastructure') have been created under 'TailwindTraders'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Project Settings > Project configuration > Areas page, or in an Area Path dropdown menu, the child areas 'Backend', 'Frontend', and 'Infrastructure' are visible under the root 'TailwindTraders' area.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 3 Backend work items are assigned to the 'TailwindTraders\Backend' area path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Work Items list or individual work item views, the Area Path for 'Implement product search API endpoint', 'Design REST API rate limiter middleware', and 'Fix product price rounding error' is set to 'TailwindTraders\Backend'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 3 Frontend work items are assigned to the 'TailwindTraders\Frontend' area path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Work Items list or individual work item views, the Area Path for 'Redesign shopping cart UI', 'Fix CSS grid layout on product listing page', and 'Optimize dashboard lazy loading' is set to 'TailwindTraders\Frontend'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 2 Infrastructure work items are assigned to the 'TailwindTraders\Infrastructure' area path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Work Items list or individual work item views, the Area Path for 'Configure CI/CD pipeline alerts' and 'Set up automated database backup schedule' is set to 'TailwindTraders\Infrastructure'.

task_completion.description: Verify that no work items remain in the root 'TailwindTraders' area path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Work Items list showing all items, there are no work items with the Area Path exactly matching 'TailwindTraders' (without a sub-area).

integrity.description: The agent used the Azure DevOps web interface to perform the actions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Azure DevOps web portal in a browser, with menus and forms being interacted with.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows, PowerShell, or command prompt screens showing API calls or scripts being executed to modify the work items.

integrity.description: The results appear to come from genuine software interaction.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
The task requires creating 3 child areas under TailwindTraders: Backend, Frontend, and Infrastructure. The 8 work items must be mapped as follows: 
Backend: 'Implement product search API endpoint', 'Design REST API rate limiter middleware', 'Fix product price rounding error'. 
Frontend: 'Redesign shopping cart UI', 'Fix CSS grid layout on product listing page', 'Optimize dashboard lazy loading'. 
Infrastructure: 'Configure CI/CD pipeline alerts', 'Set up automated database backup schedule'.
